jobs.prompt:
Create a premium Instagram carousel slide for Maven, an Indian stock market research brand (trymaven.in).

Canvas: 1080x1350 px, 4:5 Instagram carousel.
Brand: Maven / trymaven.in
Topic: A risk-off Monday
Slide: 1 of 3

Text content to render cleanly and legibly:
Headline: A risk-off Monday
Subtitle: Renewed US-Iran tension lifted oil and the dollar, and Indian indices snapped a two-day rising streak.
Bullets:
- Sensex  76,728.37   -372 pts  (-0.48%)
- Nifty 50  23,946.25   -110 pts  (-0.46%)
- Bank Nifty  ~58,120   -0.10%
Takeaway: An external shock, not a domestic one. Domestic funds net bought about Rs 5,748 cr, cushioning the fall.
Footer source (tiny): Source: Business Standard · Upstox
Footer brand (tiny): Maven · trymaven.in

Visual style: Dark cover (slide 1) + light data cards (slides 2-3).
Background: Mixed: dark navy hero, light analytical interiors.
Typography: Consistent sans family across both modes.

Premium finance-editorial design: clean, modern, minimalist, strong typographic
hierarchy, generous whitespace, subtle data/chart elements, professional
Indian-market research aesthetic. Use ONE main visual idea only. All rendered
text must be real words, correctly spelled, high-contrast and legible on a phone.
Place Maven · trymaven.in subtly in the footer. Keep the source line tiny in the footer.

Composition for THIS slide: Dark cover slide: near-black navy background, oversized headline, a single faint downward trend line, three index delta chips. Lots of negative space.

Avoid: basic Canva template, generic stock-market poster, random candlestick background, clutter, fake numbers, fake logos, unreadable tiny text, cheap AI look, cartoon style, meme style, overcomplicated 3D, glossy 3D coins, copied smallcase layout, watermark, gibberish text, bull/bear mascots, buy/sell arrows, price targets

Regeneration rule: if regenerating, do NOT reuse the same layout, background,
visual metaphor, colour emphasis, or composition — create a genuinely different
premium version.

Top eyebrow label (small, uppercase, letter-spaced): MARKET DIGEST  ·  29 JUN 2026
